title: Scientific Analysis of Coal Processing Products
author: Azizbek, KUCHAROV
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.title: This paper investigated the total concentration...
steps.instruction:
This paper investigated the total concentration of micronutrients in    lignite and coals. In addition, the results of spectrum analysis of SFKM-2 with two sodium salt reagent (HR) and its complex with non-ferrous metals (Co2+ and Ni2+) (MeR) are presented.     
  In order to bring the quality of lignite and hard coal to the required level, it is necessary to create a method of beneficiation. One of these methods is the development and introduction of chemical processing and beneficiation technology of mined coal, and it is becoming an urgent problem to create coal production technology that meets the requirements of clean quality.   Electron microscope image of 2BR-B2 Angren lignite before enrichment and its elemental composition results are also presented.
